description: Built a UK bank from scratch: a core banking migration delivered without incident, a new retail banking app launched, and the engineering teams scaled to match.
Scaled frontend delivery across International Sports — from one squad to six, with 30+ engineers shipping across the tribe.
Ran the mission-critical Customer Integration services — reliable, observable, and supportable at 3am.
Rebuilt the Event Genius and Ticket Arena ticketing platforms from the ground up, while running all of technology for the business.
Shipped the company's internal products across .NET, SharePoint, Dynamics and mobile — and took my first steps into leadership.
Core developer on HHub2, the platform at the heart of the business.
Where I cut my teeth. Consultancy work: you learn quickly, or not at all.
